description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On July 21, 2025 at 3:53 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Inglewood, California was in a collision 
involving a passenger car on S. Grevillea Avenue at E. Spruce Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound on S. Grevillea Avenue and slowing for a queue of traffic stopped for a stop sign at the 
intersection at E. Spruce Avenue. While the Waymo AV was slowing, a passenger car traveling southbound on S. Grevillea Avenue 
approached the Waymo AV from behind and the front of the passenger car made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of the 
impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
